info.name: BOLO API
info.description:
Complete BOLO REST API collection.

**Setup:**
1. Set `baseUrl` variable → `http://localhost:3000`
2. **Dev mode:** Call `POST /api/v1/auth/dev-login` with a demo email + password `bolo1234`
3. **Prod mode:** Call `POST /api/v1/auth/request-otp` → get OTP from email → `POST /api/v1/auth/verify-otp`
4. Cookie `token` is set automatically — all protected requests use it.

**Tenant scoping:** `tenantId` comes from the JWT cookie — never send it in the body.
**Dates:** All date fields returned in IST (+05:30) e.g. `2026-06-28T14:30:00.000+05:30`.

**Demo accounts (dev-login only):**
- sarangjadhav661@gmail.com — TOP (Dean, USR00001)
- shivam.a@college.edu — MID (HoD, USR00003)
- riya.sharma@college.edu — EXECUTOR (Faculty, USR00007)
- yogesh.kamble@college.edu — EXECUTOR (Faculty, USR00005)

request.description: Public — no auth required.
Sends a 6-digit OTP to the email. Rate limited: 1 request per 60 seconds. OTP expires in 10 min.

exec: console.log('Logged in as', data.name, '| role:', data.roleLevel);

request.description:
Exchange OTP for JWT. Sets httpOnly cookie token.

Lockout: 3 wrong attempts → 15 min lockout.
Clears the token cookie server-side.

view is REQUIRED:
- assigned — tasks where YOU are the assignee (excludes DRAFT, DONE_D, CANCELLED)
- delegated — tasks where YOU are the assigner (excludes DONE_D)
- needs_attention — tasks where you are assigner or assignee AND status is OPEN/OVERDUE/DONE_A

Response: { data: { data: Task[], pagination: { page, limit, total } } }
Each Task row includes commentCount (number) and latestComment (id, authorId, authorName, text, isEdited, createdAt — null if no comments yet), a lightweight preview of the most recent comment. Use GET /tasks/:id/comments or GET /tasks/:id for the full thread.
All dates in IST (+05:30).

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Prepare semester exam schedule",
  "assigneeId": "USR00007",
  "dueDate": "2026-07-15T18:30:00.000Z",
  "priority": "P2",
  "description": "Include all departments. Submit to Dean by June 30."
}

request.description:
Required: title + assigneeId.
Optional: dueDate, priority (P1-P4, default P3), description, projectLabelId, voiceRecording.

No dueDate → status = DRAFT
With dueDate → status = OPEN
title is immutable after creation

Optional voice recording:
{
  "voiceRecording": {
    "rawTranscript": "Schedule semester exams",
    "language": "hi-en",
    "durationSecs": 8,
    "confidenceScore": 0.92
  }
}

Full task detail including subtasks[], comments[], evidence[], myPersonalLabels[], voiceRecording.

Returns 403 if caller is neither assigner nor assignee.
All dates in IST (+05:30).

Assigner only. Editable: assigneeId, dueDate, priority, projectLabelId, description.

- title is immutable → 400 TITLE_IMMUTABLE
- Cannot update once DONE_D or CANCELLED → 409 TASK_TERMINAL
- Cannot reassign if subtasks exist → 409 REASSIGN_BLOCKED
- Setting dueDate: null reverts task to DRAFT

To reassign: { "assigneeId": "USR00003" }
To clear label: { "projectLabelId": null }

Assigner only. Recursively deletes all subtasks, comments, evidence, personal labels.
Cannot delete DONE_D → 400 TASK_TERMINAL.

Assignee only. OPEN → IN_PROGRESS. Sets acceptedAt.
Returns { status: 'IN_PROGRESS', acceptedAt: '...+05:30' }.

Assignee only. IN_PROGRESS | OVERDUE → DONE_A.
Assigner must then call done-d to archive the task.

Assigner only. Confirms completion → DONE_D + archives (isArchived: true).
All subtasks must be DONE_D first → 409 SUBTASKS_INCOMPLETE.

Assigner only. Cascades CANCELLED to all non-DONE_D subtasks.
Cannot cancel DONE_D → 400 TASK_TERMINAL.

Assigner only. Sends reminder notification to assignee.
Valid states: OPEN, IN_PROGRESS, OVERDUE.

item.name: Subtasks
item.description:
Subtasks are nested under their parent task. Same Task model with parentTaskId set.
Get subtask detail via GET /api/tasks/:subtaskId.

request.description:
Parent task assignee only. Parent must be IN_PROGRESS.

Required: title, assigneeId, dueDate.
dueDate must be earlier than parent dueDate → 400 SUBTASK_DUE_DATE_INVALID.
assigneeId cannot be the parent task assigner → 400 ASSIGNMENT_LOOP.

Use the main GET /api/tasks/:id endpoint with the subtask ID.
Response includes parentTaskId to identify it as a subtask.
Subtask assigner (= parent task assignee) only. Same field rules as PATCH /tasks/:id.
Subtask assigner only. Cannot delete once DONE_D.
Subtask assignee only. OPEN → IN_PROGRESS.
Subtask assignee only. IN_PROGRESS | OVERDUE → DONE_A.

Subtask assigner only (= parent task assignee). DONE_A → DONE_D.
Once all subtasks are DONE_D, parent assigner can call POST /tasks/:id/done-d.
Subtask assigner only. Cannot cancel once DONE_D → 400.

Caller must be assigner or assignee. Sorted by createdAt ASC.
Comments are also returned in GET /api/tasks/:id as comments[].
Both assigner and assignee can comment. Fires COMMENT_ADDED notification to the other party.
Author only. Sets isEdited=true.
Author only.

item.name: Evidence
item.description: Two-step upload flow: get pre-signed S3 URL → PUT file directly to S3 → confirm upload.

request.description:
Step 1 of 2. Returns { uploadUrl, evidenceId, expiresIn }.
Client PUTs the file directly to uploadUrl (S3), then calls Confirm Upload.
Caller must be assigner or assignee.

Returns evidence for a task. File URLs are pre-signed S3 read URLs expiring in 1 hour.
Evidence is also returned in GET /api/tasks/:id as evidence[].
Step 2 of 2 — call after S3 PUT succeeds. Fires EVIDENCE_ATTACHED notification.
Uploader or assigner only. Deletes from S3 and DB.

item.name: Voice Recording
item.description: Transcript is saved atomically with the task by POST /tasks (Tasks folder). This is the separate, optional two-phase audio flow: presign → PUT to S3 → confirm.

request.description: Called after POST /tasks (with a voiceRecording body) returns 201. Returns { uploadUrl, s3Key, expiresIn }. Client PUTs the audio blob directly to uploadUrl, then calls Confirm Audio. 400 if the task has no voice_recordings row (i.e. it wasn't created via voice) or contentType is unsupported. Caller must be assigner or assignee.
Call after the S3 PUT succeeds. Server moves the object from unconfirmed/ to the confirmed path and sets audioUrl. Idempotent — safe to retry. Returns { hasAudio: true }.
Returns rawTranscript, language, durationSecs, confidenceScore, hasAudio. Never returns the raw S3 key. 404 if the task has no voice recording.
Returns a fresh 15-min pre-signed playback URL. Only callable if hasAudio is true — 404 if no audio is stored.

item.name: Personal Labels
item.description: Tier-2 private labels — visible only to the user who added them. Both assigner and assignee can add labels independently.

item.name: Get My Personal Labels on Task

request.description:
Returns only the calling user's labels — never returns other users' labels.
Also returned as myPersonalLabels[] in GET /api/tasks/:id.
colorCode optional (6-digit hex, defaults to #6B7280). description optional (defaults to null). Duplicate label by the same user on the same task → 400.
Owner only.
Returns distinct label strings the calling user has applied across all tasks — for the autocomplete dropdown.

item.name: Project Labels
item.description: Tier-1 shared labels — visible to all tenant members on a task.

request.description: Returns all labels scoped to the caller's tenant.
Name must be unique within the tenant. colorCode optional (6-digit hex, defaults to #6B7280). description optional (defaults to null).
Creator only. Partial update — at least one of name, colorCode, description required.
Creator only. 400 LABEL_IN_USE if any active (non-DONE_D/CANCELLED) task references this label.

item.name: Sticky Notes
item.description: All notes are private — never shared with others. dueAt makes a note a reminder.

request.description:
Private — only the calling user's notes.
Sorted: pinned first → dueAt ASC (nulls last) → createdAt DESC.

dueAt is optional — when set the note acts as a reminder.
isPinned: optional, default false.
Owner only.
Owner only. Pass dueAt: null to clear the reminder.
Owner only.

Creates a Task using the note text as the title. Sets promotedToTaskId on the note.
Omit assigneeId/dueDate to create as DRAFT.
400 ALREADY_PROMOTED if already promoted.

item.name: Broadcast Notices
item.description: Requires canBroadcast: true on TenantMembership to create. Broadcasts expire after 24 hours.

request.description: 'received' (default): non-expired broadcasts where audience dept+roleLevel matches the caller. 'sent': everything senderId=me created, any status (DRAFT+PUBLISHED, including expired).

body.raw:
{ "messageJson": {}, "messageHtml": "

Exam dates: July 15-25. All faculty must submit question papers by July 12.

", "audienceDeptId": null, "audienceRoleLevel": "EXECUTOR", "requiresAcknowledgement": true, "imageUrl": null }

request.description:
Requires canBroadcast: true on TenantMembership → 403 BROADCAST_NOT_PERMITTED otherwise.
Save as draft first, then publish. ~200 char limit on visible text.
Sender only. Only DRAFT status can be edited → 400 BROADCAST_ALREADY_PUBLISHED if already published.
Sender only.

DRAFT → PUBLISHED. Sets expiresAt = now+24h.
audienceDeptId + audienceRoleLevel must both be set → 400 DRAFT_MISSING_FIELDS.

Broadcast must be PUBLISHED, not expired, and requiresAcknowledgement=true.
409 ALREADY_ACKNOWLEDGED if called again.
Sender only. Returns { broadcastId, ackCount }. Sender sees count only — no per-person breakdown.

item.name: Notifications
item.description: In-app only; system-generated. Client polls on an interval.

query.description: true | false — omit to get all

request.description: Returns recipientId=me rows only.
Cheap COUNT query — used by top-bar icon badge. Returns { count: 7 }.
Sets isRead=true, readAt=now.
Returns { updatedCount: 7 }.
Returns name, email, preferredLang, tenantName, roleLevel, roleLabel, departmentName, reportsToName, canBroadcast.
Only name and preferredLang (EN|HI) are editable.
TOP role only. Returns tenant name, vertical, memberCount, deptCount.
Any authenticated member. Used for the assignee picker.
TOP and MID roles. Flat list with reportsToId links — build tree client-side.
Only for superadmin. Looked up against PlatformAdmin, not User. 404 ADMIN_NOT_FOUND if no row exists — admins are provisioned only via `npm run seed:platform-admin`, never self-registered.

exec: console.log('Platform admin logged in:', data.adminId, data.email);

request.description:
Only for superadmin. Exchange OTP for a platform-admin JWT. Sets httpOnly cookie `admin_token` — separate from the tenant-user `token` cookie, never collides.

Lockout: 3 wrong attempts → 15 min lockout.
Only for superadmin. Clears the admin_token cookie server-side.

exec: console.log('Tenant created:', d.tenantId, '| Admin userId:', d.admin.userId);

request.description:
Only for superadmin (requires admin_token cookie — run Verify OTP above first). Creates Tenant + first TOP user + TenantMembership atomically — replaces the old, now-removed, public POST /onboard/register.

vertical: EDUCATION | CA_CS
roleLabel: optional — defaults to Dean (EDUCATION) or Director (CA_CS)
preferredLang: EN | HI (optional, default EN)

Writes an AuditLog row (action: TENANT_CREATED).
Only for superadmin. Cross-tenant listing with member/department counts.

item.name: Add Member to Any Tenant (only for superadmin)

request.description: Only for superadmin. Same validation/shape as Invite Member above, but tenantId comes from the URL param (no tenant-scoped JWT). Writes an AuditLog row (action: MEMBER_ADDED).

item.name: Remove Member from Any Tenant (only for superadmin)

request.description: Only for superadmin. Hard-deletes the TenantMembership row only — User row left intact. Writes an AuditLog row (action: MEMBER_REMOVED).

item.name: Bulk Import Members — Excel (only for superadmin)

formdata.description: .xlsx or .xls. Same columns as the TOP-only version above. Max 50 MB.

request.description: Only for superadmin. Same bulkImportService as Bulk Import Members — Excel above, but tenantId comes from the URL param (any tenant). Writes an AuditLog row (action: MEMBERS_BULK_IMPORTED).

item.name: Bulk Import Members — JSON (only for superadmin)

request.description: Only for superadmin. JSON alternative to Excel upload — any tenant via URL param. Same idempotent upsert behaviour.
Any authenticated tenant member. Returns id, name, headUserId, headName, memberCount.
Any authenticated member. 404 if department belongs to a different tenant.

TOP role only. Pass headUserId: null to clear the head.
409 HEAD_ALREADY_ASSIGNED if user already heads another department.

query.description: task | sticky_note | broadcast | comment — omit to search all

request.description:
Full-text search scoped to tenantId + entities the caller can access.
Returns snippets with highlights.
Access: TOP role OR assigner of the entity. Tenant-scoped.

TOP sees all departments; MID sees own department only.
Refreshed once daily — not real-time.
Returns totalTasks, onTime, beforeTime, overdue, effectivenessScore per member.
